examples: The man is very hospitable; he keeps open house for his friends and fellow-workers.
The author thinks her friend made a rational decision in choosing a more hospitable place over an apparently elegant assisted living home.
The locals are hospitable and welcoming.
When I visited him recently, Faqiryar, normally a hospitable man, refused to answer his door.
Applicants may also want to adjust their list of employers to more hospitable prospects.
